_comment: Synthetic Procurement-shape orphan fixture for the record-by-record extractor (ai-brain#244, parent #237 AC#9). Models a real-world Procurement-shape orphan entity-table cluster — single-table cluster, no link fields, low-but-≥0.95 unique_rate primary (description unique_rate=0.99 from the 2026-05-03 research report). PRODUCTION CLASSIFICATION NOTE: per the 2026-05-05 reframe (#237 grill), procurement-shaped tables are classified as `interaction` in production and routed to emit-edges (#241), NOT to this extractor. This fixture exists to test the record-by-record extractor's SHAPE BEHAVIOR on orphan-shaped data. The fixture deliberately includes one COLLISION pair (rec03/rec04 share NK value) so the extractor's slug-disambiguation invariant (slug bakes record_id) is covered by an assertion. Records and field values are SYNTHESISED.

fields.notes: Second printer for accounting team — collision case (same NK as recProc03).
